/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Old.Guitarist_Standalone.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Old.Guitarist_Standalone.dir/modules/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Old.Guitarist_Standalone.dir/modules/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Old.Guitarist_Standalone.dir/modules/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_ARA.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Old.Guitarist_Standalone.dir/modules/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_LV2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Old.Guitarist_Standalone.dir/modules/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Standalone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Old.Guitarist_Standalone.dir/modules/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Unity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Old.Guitarist_Standalone.dir/modules/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Old.Guitarist_Standalone.dir/modules/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST3.cpp.o -o Old.Guitarist_artefacts/Release/Standalone/Old.Guitarist  Old.Guitarist_artefacts/Release/libOld.Guitarist_SharedCode.a libData.a /usr/lib64/libfontconfig.so /usr/lib64/libfreetype.so /usr/lib64/libasound.so -lrt -ldl -lpthread -flto -lgcc_s_asneeded -lgcc_s_asneeded
